chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – Satisfaction with the Judgement (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/ 8)
text: إِنَّ أَعْلَمَ النَّاسِ بِاللَّهِ أَرْضَاهُمْ بِقَضَاءِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Abdullah Bin Muskan, from Lays Al Murady,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The most knowledgeable of the people with Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the one most satisfied of them with the Judgement of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn ‘Abd Allah from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muskan from Layth al- Muradi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘The most knowledgeable among people is the one who agrees with the decisions of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy.’”
